ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Continued To Jun-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Higuera (Beneficiary) in Pro Per. Dorothy Brown (Trustor) also present. Emilie Calhoun for Verlinda Richardson (Petitioner).

Mr. Higuera requested a three week continuance stating that he needed to seek counsel. In addition, he also stated that his Mother had been dealing with some health issues. The matter was continued to June 24, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison CSR#4609. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Fpr Issuance Of An Order To Show Cause To Co-Trustees D. Higuera And D. Brown Why They Should Not Be Sanctioned For Failure To Comply With The Terms Of Settlement Agreement, And Mem. Of Poitns And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Issuance Of Order To Show Cause.
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhon for Verlinda Richardson.

Ms. Richardson stated that Dorothy Brown and Richard Higuera (Trustees) had not complied with the terms of the settlement, that the estate was too small for a professional fiduciary and that she was hoping that the Order To Show Cause would encourage Mr. Higuera to comply. In addition, she stated that she was concerned about the money being spent too quickly. The Court granted the Motion For Entry Of Judgment Under The Terms Of The Settlement and granted the Motion for An Issuance Of An Order To Show Cause, (signing the orders for the same in open court). The return date on the Order to Show Cause is June 10, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and is to be served by personal service by May 10, 2008. Ms. Calhoun will prepare the Order To Show Cause.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Judgment Under Terms Of Settlement Agreement, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Under Terms Of Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Pro Bono Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appearing for and with Verlina Richardson, one of three trustees. The other two trustees Dorothy E Brown and David Higuera are both in court. Mr. Barringer stated that all parties in this proceeding are in court and they have arrived in a settlement agreement. He read the settlement agreement into the record. All parties have signed the settlement agreement. Court instructed Mr. Barringer to voir dire all parties as to their understanding of the settlement agreement. All parties confirmed their approval of the settlement agreement. Court approved the mediation agreement that was read into the record and instructed counsel to prepare an order for approval of the mediation agreement.
Judge: Paul H Alvarado. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR# 5292. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Instructions And For An Accounting By Co Trustee

MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appearing for petitioner. David Higuera appearing as trustee in pro per. Both sides agreed to mediation. Court is referring this matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed not later than 11/16. Matter is continued to 11/19 for status conference. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.
